title.zh: scikit-learn SVM：处理空 support vectors 的 sparse fit
title.en: scikit-learn SVM: handle sparse fit with empty support vectors

summary.zh: 审查一个 scikit-learn SVM PR：作者在 n_SV 为 0 时走专门分支，避免稀疏 dual_coef_ 构造失败。
summary.en: Review a scikit-learn SVM PR: the author adds a special branch for n_SV == 0 to avoid sparse dual_coef_ construction failures.

reviewTarget.note: The reviewed patch is an AgentCode adapted patch for review training. It is not the upstream maintainer patch unless explicitly stated.

pr.title: Avoid sparse SVM dual_coef_ construction errors when there are no support vectors
pr.author: codegen-agent
body: Sparse SVM fitting can hit an edge case where there are no support vectors. The current code still tries to construct dual_coef_ from CSR indptr/index arrays, which can fail or divide through empty support-vector state.
This PR adds a fast path for n_SV == 0 and assigns an empty csr_matrix directly. Normal sparse SVM fits continue to use the existing CSR construction path.
Added a regression test that fits the sparse model in the empty-support-vector case and confirms dual_coef_ is empty. Existing SVM tests pass.

background: scikit-learn estimator attributes have public shape contracts. Empty data still needs the shape downstream code expects.
For SVMs, dual_coef_ shape is tied to the number of classes and support vectors, not only to whether the matrix has zero stored elements.
The review context includes the pre-patch sparse dual_coef_ construction excerpt in src-svm-base.py.

notes: The patch avoids the immediate empty-data path but creates sp.csr_matrix([]), whose shape is not the estimator-compatible (n_class, 0) shape expected by downstream code.
In numerical libraries, empty arrays and sparse matrices still carry semantic shape. A size-zero assertion is insufficient because multiple wrong shapes can have zero elements.
The fix should construct an explicitly shaped empty sparse matrix and tests should assert dual_coef_.shape, related public attributes, and a post-fit prediction or attribute path.

learningGoal: 判断异常规避是否保持 estimator 属性形状不变量。

terms.description: SVM 训练后保留的支持向量数组。
SVM dual coefficients，形状需要和类别数、支持向量数一致。
对象属性在边界情况下也必须保持的形状约束。

behaviorChecks.expected: 不能因为空支持向量崩溃。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: PR 是否只避免了异常？

behaviorChecks.expected: dual_coef_ 应保持 estimator 约定的二维形状。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 空矩阵是否有明确 shape？

behaviorChecks.input: fit 后访问属性或 predict
behaviorChecks.expected: 不应因为属性形状错误崩溃。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 测试是否覆盖训练后的 shape 与下游路径？
